title: spit&chew
body:
spit&chew is a lightweight yet innovative Minecraft mod that introduces new functionality for sugar cane. Designed with simplicity and immersion in mind, this mod allows players to shred sugar cane into consumable sugar cane juice, adding a refreshing twist to the game.

Key Features:
Shred Sugar Cane: Transform sugar cane into a drinkable form using a stonecutter
Sugar Cane Juice: A consumable item that provides hydration and a temporary speed boost, ideal for adventurers on the go.
Integration: Seamlessly fits into vanilla gameplay, using familiar mechanics and recipes to maintain balance.
Whether you're seeking an edge in your next exploration or simply looking to enhance your agricultural pursuits, Sugar Cane Shredder offers a sweet new experience for players of all kinds.
